assessment.note: Names two specific absences — clearer prioritization and more air cover in cross-team decisions — indicating strong clarity deficit; [THREAD-DEFERRED-WINDDOWN] support needs already named, so move to closer stage.

new_queue.label: Support gap
new_queue.name: Where would a bit more support make the biggest difference right now?
new_queue.description: Surfaces the most useful form of manager help without forcing her to frame it as a complaint.

new_queue.label: Next step
new_queue.name: Given what we've covered, where do you want to focus first?
new_queue.description: Closes by turning the conversation into a specific next move with a clear time horizon.
